note: Metadata only. Real op functions are inlined in ~/.claude/workflows/appsec-orchestrator.js because workflow body cannot import. This manifest documents what's available for spec authors.

fingerprint_cluster.description: Cluster normalized findings by fingerprint(file+title.toLowerCase). Outputs { all_clusters, eligible_clusters, pruned_count }. Eligibility = severity meets ctx.severity_floor.

appsec_gate_policy.description: Compute BLOCK/WARN/PASS gate decision. BLOCK if: missing CSF coverage OR blocking_findings (high/critical accepted) OR recall < oracle.recall_metric.minimum_acceptable. WARN if medium accepted. PASS otherwise.

compute_recall.description: Compute oracle confirmation rate. Reserved for future fine-grained recall reporting.

no_candidates.description: Returns true if state.Find produced zero candidate_findings across all finders.

no_accepted.description: Returns true if state.Verify has zero clusters with resolved='accept'.

ensure_csf_coverage.description: Post-invariant on Plan output. Force required_csf_functions to include all 6 CSF; auto-add missing finders to selected_finders to cover each CSF.

prune_below_floor.description: Post-invariant on Dedup output. Filter eligible_clusters to those meeting ctx.severity_floor. Reserved for future use; fingerprint_cluster already does this.
